MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Chas. Ayres Company and Quad C Corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Nichole M. Rodich, CSR #11604. Telephone: 415-551-0616.

Michael Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Virgina Poblitz, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of Howard Poblitz, Deceased; and Richard Poblitz, Randall Poblitz, Rory Poblitz, Cynthia Mallen, Brian Keating, Timothy Keating, Daniel Keating, as Wrongful Death Heirs of Howard Poblitz, Deceased.

No appearance by defaulted defendants Chas. Ayres Company or Quad C Corporation.

Default was entered against defendant Chas. Ayres Company on September 17, 2015.
Statement of Damages as to defendant Chas. Ayres Company was filed and served on September 17, 2015.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on January 8, 2018.

Default was entered against defendant Quad C Corporation on December 7, 2017.
Statement of Damages as to defendant Quad C Corporation was filed and served on September 17, 2015.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on January 8, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Virgina Poblitz, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of Howard Poblitz, Deceased; and Richard Poblitz, Randall Poblitz, Rory Poblitz, Cynthia Mallen, Brian Keating, Timothy Keating, Daniel Keating, as Wrongful Death Heirs of Howard Poblitz, Deceased, and against the Defaulted Defendants Chas. Ayres Company and Quad C Corporation, as follows:

Economic Damages: $424,917.57.
Non-Economic Damages - $13,000,000.00.
Total - $13,424,917.57.

Defendant Quad C Corporation:
Economic Damages: $424,917.57.
Non-Economic Damages - $13,000,000.00.
Total - $13,424,917.57.
